title: aristea schizolaena
intro: Aristea schizolaena, also known as the yellow aristea, is a plant species native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa, belonging to the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aristea schizolaena include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
